subject: A humanoid figure kneeling with arms spread wide and head thrown back in a ritual chamber surrounded by candles on candelabras and skulls on pedestals
description: A single armored figure kneels in the center of a ritual chamber, arms stretched horizontally to either side, head thrown fully back in an expression of ecstasy, pain, or devoted surrender. The figure wears dark armor with gold trim. The chamber is flanked by tall red candles on candelabras and flanked by skulls mounted on low pedestals — both with crimson accents. Behind the figure, tall draped banners hang in a warm golden-red light. The entire scene is bathed in amber and gold candlelight, creating an intensely warm, devotional atmosphere. The body language of open arms, tilted-back head, and kneeling posture reads simultaneously as sacrifice, rapture, and cult ritual. No weapon is visible — the figure's hands are empty and extended.
foreground: Kneeling armored figure with arms spread and head thrown back, skulls on pedestals flanking
background: Ritual chamber with tall candles on candelabras, draped red-gold banners, warm ambient glow
emotion: Ecstatic surrender — head back, arms wide, posture reads as rapture or offering, no face visible
